evals.name: Rust project full workflow
evals.prompt: 我需要在现有的Rust项目中添加一个支持并发写入的日志系统，要求文件超过10MB自动轮转，按日期-序号命名
evals.expected_output: SDD-Workflow应该检测到Rust项目，自动加载nexus-mapper生成架构知识图谱，提供架构感知的需求分析，并启动多Agent开发流程

evals.name: Skill loading verification
evals.expected_output: SDD-Workflow技能应该被正确识别并加载，显示智能引导界面询问开发者需求

evals.name: Existing nexus-map awareness
evals.prompt: 我已经有了.nexus-map/架构知识库，现在要添加异步日志支持
evals.expected_output: SDD-Workflow应该自动加载现有.nexus-map/，进行架构兼容性分析，生成包含异步支持的兼容设计方案

evals.name: Anti-superficiality check — catches placeholder content
evals.prompt: 在现有Python项目中添加缓存层
evals.expected_output: Understanding阶段的深度检查应拒绝包含'需要研究'、'方案 A'等占位文本的研究报告。代码库分析必须列出具体文件路径。

evals.name: Context persistence — AGENTS.md generated
evals.prompt: 完成一个特性的完整6阶段开发流程
evals.expected_output: Phase 6应生成包含以下内容的AGENTS.md: 特性状态、需求列表、设计决策、实现文件、审查制品状态、对话记忆摘要、恢复指引

evals.name: Context recovery — sdd resume with memory
evals.prompt: 在上次中断的Phase 3恢复开发，检查是否能恢复之前的讨论上下文
evals.expected_output: sdd resume应读取AGENTS.md和ConversationMemory，注入到Execution Context。LLM应能回答: 该特性的目标是什么？做了哪些设计决策？下一步该做什么？

evals.name: Phase boundary compression
evals.expected_output: 在Phase Gate确认后，AI必须生成Phase 1的结构化摘要（完成内容、关键决策、问题、待解决项、注意事项）并写入findings.md

evals.name: Multi-agent conflict detection
evals.prompt: 使用subagent-driven方式并行开发3个独立模块
evals.expected_output: Coordinator应检测文件所有权冲突，确保无两个agent同时编辑同一文件。若检测到接口变更冲突，应标记并顺序化处理。

evals.name: Constitution compliance check
evals.prompt: 设计一个违反单一职责原则的模块
evals.expected_output: ConstitutionEnforcer应检测到DESIGN-001违规并阻止进入下一Phase

evals.name: Loop detection — excessive file editing
evals.prompt: 对同一个文件反复编辑超过15次
evals.expected_output: LoopDetectionMiddleware应在第5次编辑时发出警告，第15次时硬性阻止并要求用户选择: reconsider / reset / continue

evals.name: Delta review — only incremental changes
evals.expected_output: Phase 5应仅审查actual_file_changes中的增量文件，而非整个代码库。审查报告应标注'Review Scope: Delta Review'

evals.name: Understanding phase rejects 0-constraint analysis
evals.prompt: 为一个'简单'功能生成研究报告，只列出1个约束条件
evals.expected_output: Anti-superficiality检查应拒绝该报告（约束条件不足2个），要求补充分析后才能进入Phase 1

validation_functions.check_anti_superficiality: Verify UnderstandingCapability._anti_superficiality_check returns passed=False when placeholder patterns detected
validation_functions.check_agents_md_content: Verify AGENTS.md contains sections: Feature Status, Requirements, Architecture & Design, Implementation Files, Review Artifacts, Conversation Memory, How to Resume
validation_functions.check_resume_context: Verify Director.inject_memory_context populates context.metadata['injected_context'] with AGENTS.md + ConversationMemory content
validation_functions.check_phase_compression: Verify findings.md contains '## Design Summary' or '## Plan Summary' after phase gate confirmation
validation_functions.check_multi_agent_conflicts: Verify CoordinatorAgent.detect_conflicts identifies overlapping file modifications
validation_functions.check_constitution_enforcement: Verify PhaseGateMiddleware.before_action blocks when constitution is violated
validation_functions.check_loop_detection: Verify LoopDetectionMiddleware returns requires_confirmation=True at warning threshold
validation_functions.check_delta_review_scope: Verify Phase 5 review output contains 'Review Scope: Delta Review' and lists only incremental files
validation_functions.check_min_constraints: Verify understanding depth check requires >= 2 constraints
